title: DM Shared Appearance
summary: Enables shared cloud-saved appearance themes for DM (closet) rooms. Both participants load and see the same header/messages colour theme.

changes.description: Removed the !_isDm guard on loadRoomAppearance+applyRoomAppearance so DM rooms also load and apply their shared appearance on join.
Added <div id="styleDmAppearanceSection"> placeholder in the Style tab HTML, shown only when chatting in a DM.
Added DM Shared Appearance section: colour pickers + hex inputs for headerBg, headerTextColor, msgsBg. Rendered only when in a DM room.
Save Shared Theme button reads the hex inputs, writes to roomAppearancePath(currentRoom) via ghPutJson, refreshes _roomAppearanceCache, calls applyRoomAppearance, and shows a toast.
